page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m1.large is a burstable virtual machine instance belonging to the ecs.t6 family. It is built on the KVM hypervisor and powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY processor with an x86_64 architecture. The instance features 2 vCPUs across 2 physical cores with 1 thread per core, operating at a base frequency of 2.5 GHz. It is configured with 2.0 GB of system memory, providing a resource density of 1.0 GB per core. This instance does not include local storage or dedicated GPUs, and operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 0 Gbps.

Benchmark data indicates that the ecs.t6-c1m1.large delivers entry-level performance. In stress-ng testing, the instance achieved a single-core CPU score of 1255.78 and a multi-core score of 2507.5, both placing in the bottom 25% of tested hardware. Memory performance is similarly constrained, with uncached read-only large block bandwidth measured at 20.37 GB/sec and write bandwidth at 15.46 GB/sec. Passmark testing yields a CPU score of 2938.6 and a database operations score of 616.76, reflecting its positioning in the bottom 10% for intensive database workloads.

Given its burstable CPU allocation and low resource density, this instance offers a highly cost-efficient profile for workloads with low baseline CPU utilization that experience occasional spikes. It is not suitable for memory-intensive applications, high-throughput databases, or sustained compute tasks. Appropriate workloads include lightweight web serving, basic microservices, development and testing environments, and low-traffic background tasks.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m1.large is a burstable, entry-level virtual machine instance powered by an Intel Xeon 8269CY x86_64 processor. It features 2 vCPUs, 2.0 GB of RAM, and no local storage, operating on the KVM hypervisor. Designed for budget-conscious deployments, its performance benchmarks place it in the lower tiers, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1255.78 and uncached memory read bandwidth of 20.37 GB/sec. The instance is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that require minimal baseline CPU usage but need the ability to burst during peak periods. It is best suited for lightweight applications such as low-traffic web servers, microservices, and development environments.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.t6-c1m1.large is a burstable KVM instance with 2 vCPUs, 2.0 GB RAM, and an Intel Xeon 8269CY CPU, designed for lightweight workloads and budget-conscious development environments.

tagline: A burstable, budget-friendly virtual machine featuring dual Intel Xeon cores and two gigabytes of memory for lightweight workloads.
